data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

Orbital Corporation Limited ( (AU:OEC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Orbital Corporation Limited has announced the quotation of 14,285,714 ordinary fully paid securities on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) as of August 28, 2025. This move is part of previously announced transactions and is expected to enhance the company’s financial flexibility and market presence, potentially impacting its operations and stakeholder interests positively.

More about Orbital Corporation Limited

Orbital Corporation Limited operates in the aerospace and defense industry, focusing on the development and production of propulsion systems and related technologies. The company is known for its innovative solutions in the unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) market, providing advanced engine systems that enhance performance and efficiency.

An announcement from Regis Healthcare Ltd. ( (AU:REG) ) is now available.

Regis Healthcare Ltd announced a change in the director’s interest notice, with Jodie Lee Leonard acquiring 12,500 ordinary shares, increasing her indirect interest to 23,705 shares. This acquisition reflects a strategic move by the director, potentially indicating confidence in the company’s future prospects, which could have implications for stakeholders and market perception.

This move is part of the company’s strategy to enhance capital efficiency and shareholder returns, reflecting its agile approach to capital management in response to changing business environments.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from Horizon Oil Limited ( (AU:HZN) ).

Horizon Oil Limited announced the retirement of Sandra Birkensleigh from its Board as part of a planned Board refresh. Birkensleigh, who served over nine years and held key roles including Chair of the Audit Committee, is succeeded by Catherine Costello. The transition reflects Horizon’s ongoing strategic adjustments to strengthen its governance and operational oversight.

More about Horizon Oil Limited

Horizon Oil Limited operates in the energy sector, focusing on the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas resources. The company is primarily engaged in projects located in the Asia-Pacific region, aiming to deliver sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Soma Gold Corp. Reports Strong Financial Turnaround and Operational Enhancements
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Soma Gold ( (TSE:SOMA) ) has shared an update.

Soma Gold Corp. reported a significant financial turnaround in the first half of 2025, with a 21% increase in revenue and a net income of $4.8 million compared to a loss in the previous year. The company has resolved mechanical issues at its el Bagre Mill and completed construction of a new leach tank, which is expected to enhance gold production. With the el Limon Mill ramping up and processing higher-grade ore, Soma anticipates increased annual production, positioning it for growth in the gold mining industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SOMA) stock is a Hold with a C$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Soma Gold stock, see the TSE:SOMA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SOMA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SOMA is a Neutral.

Soma Gold’s overall stock score is driven by its solid financial performance, characterized by strong revenue growth and improving profitability margins. However, technical analysis indicates short-term bearish momentum, and the valuation is moderate. The absence of a dividend yield and reliance on debt financing are potential concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SOMA stock, click here.

More about Soma Gold

Soma Gold Corp. is a mining company focused on gold production and exploration, owning two adjacent mining properties in Antioquia, Colombia, with a combined milling capacity of 675 TPD. The company is committed to sustainability and community engagement, and also owns an exploration property in Brazil.

Average Trading Volume: 185,350

data.title: Structural Monitoring Systems Achieves Maiden Profit and Strengthens Financial Position
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Structural Monitoring Systems Shs Chess Depository Interests ( (AU:SMN) ) has provided an announcement.

Structural Monitoring Systems Plc reported a maiden profit of $0.2 million for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025, marking a 118% improvement from the previous year’s loss. This turnaround was driven by a management restructure and targeted sales strategy, along with significant growth in its avionics segment, particularly through increased sales of the MTP136D Forest Service Radio. The company’s financial position was bolstered by an $8.7 million share placement and Share Purchase Plan, enabling debt repayment and positioning the company for future growth in next-generation avionics products and strategic acquisitions.

More about Structural Monitoring Systems Shs Chess Depository Interests

Structural Monitoring Systems Plc operates in the avionics industry, focusing on the development and manufacturing of proprietary IP products through its wholly owned subsidiary, Anodyne Electronics Manufacturing Corp (AEM). The company is recognized for its special mission avionics product portfolio, which is a market leader, and it continues to transition from contract manufacturing to higher-margin proprietary products.
